reasoning: The control 3.5.2 focuses on authentication of identities before granting access, which maps to Kubernetes through ensuring proper authentication and authorization mechanisms are in place. This includes configuring OIDC for user authentication, enabling authentication on the API server, using RBAC for authorization, and securing service accounts by disabling automatic token mounting.
title: 3_5_2: 3.5.2 Authenticate (or verify) the identities of users, processes, or devices, as a prerequisite to allowing access to organizational systems
